name: Shanghai Mechanical & Electrical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Mechanical & Electrical Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells mechanical and electrical equipment in the People's Republic of China. The company offers elevators; and printing and packaging machinery, including printing equipment, special equipment, post press equipment, packing mechanical equipment, etc. It also provides refrigeration and air conditioning equipment, heating and ventilation equipment, and compressors; and welding equipment. In addition, the company manufactures and sells underground constriction equipment; and drilling rigs for pile formation used in highways, railways, subways, bridges, reservoirs, ports, urban construction, industrial facilities, municipal construction, geological exploration, and underground water resources development projects. Further, it offers wood-base panels and equipment; and energy-saving and contract energy management services. The company also exports its products to approximately 40 countries, including Southeast Asia, South America, North Africa, Russia, etc. Shanghai Mechanical & Electrical Industry Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
